title: The National Capital Region Planning Board Act, 1985
full_text: The National Capital Region Planning Board Act, 1985 राष्‍ट्रीय राजधानी क्षेत्र योजना बोर्ड अधिनियम,1985 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 198502 Act Number: 02 Enactment Date: 1985-02-09 Act Year: 1985 Short Title: The National Capital Region Planning Board Act, 1985 Hindi Title: राष्‍ट्रीय राजधानी क्षेत्र योजना बोर्ड अधिनियम,1985 Long Title: An Act to provide for the constitution of a Planning Board for the preparation of a plan for the development of the National Capital Region and for co-ordinating and monitoring the implementation of such plan and for evolving harmonized policies for the control of land-uses and development of infrastructure in the National Capital Region so as to avoid any haphazard development of that region and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs Enforcement Date: 19-10-1984 Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The National Capital Region Planning Board Act, 1985 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II THE NATIONAL CAPITAL REGION PLANNING BOARD CHAPTER III FUNCTIONS AND POWERS OF THE BOARD AND OF THE COMMITTEE CHAPTER IV THE REGIONAL PLAN CHAPTER V FUNCTIONAL PLANS, SUB-REGIONAL PLANS AND PROJECT PLANS CHAPTER VI FINANCE, ACCOUNTS AND AUDIT CHAPTER VII MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Constitution and incorporation of the Board. Section 4. Composition of the Planning Committee. Section 5. Power to co-opt, etc. Section 6. Vacancies, etc., not to invalidate proceedings of the Board or the Committee. Section 7. Functions of the Board. Section 8. Powers of the Board. Section 9. Functions of the Committee. Section 10. Contents of the Regional Plan. Section 11. Surveys and studies. Section 12. Procedure to be followed for the preparation of Regional Plan. Section 13. Date of coming into operation of the Regional Plan. Section 14. Modifications of the Regional Plan. Section 15. Review and revision of the Regional Plan. Section 16. Preparation of Functional Plans. Section 17. Preparation of Sub-Regional Plans. Section 18. Preparation of Project Plans. Section 19. Submission of Sub-Regional Plans to the Board. Section 20. Implementation of Sub-Regional Plans, etc. Section 21. Grants and loans by the Central Government. Section 22. Constitution of the Fund. Section 23. Budget. Section 24. Annual report. Section 25. Accounts and audit. Section 26. Annual report and auditors’ report to be laid before Parliament. Section 27. Act to have overriding effect. Section 28. Power of the Central Government to give directions. Section 29. Violation of Regional Plan. Section 30. Technical assistance to the Board. Section 31. Officers and employees of the Board. Section 32. Power to delegate. Section 33. Power of entry. Section 34. Member-Secretary, officers and other employees of the Board to be public servants. Section 35. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 36. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 37. Power to make regulations. Show Related Subordinates Section 38. Rules and regulations to be laid before Parliament. Section 39. Dissolution of the Board. Section 40. Acquisition of land and determination of rights in relation to land to be made by the Government of the participating State or Union territory. Section 41. Repeal and saving. Schedule 1.
